There are two different methods one is a linear search and the second one is binary search. This binary search follows divide and conquer strategy. If you remember in divide and conquer strategy we learned that if the size of a problem is large, break the problem into sub problems. Once the sub problem is solved, sub problems are solved combine them to get the solution for main problem. So for performing binary search we need two index pointers. One is low that is a starting point and the second one is high that is a ending point.
